title: stelis umbelliformis subsp. brevipedunculata
intro: Stelis umbelliformis subsp. brevipedunculata is a subspecies of orchid native to tropical regions, known for its unique umbrella-shaped inflorescence. It is reported to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Stelis umbelliformis subsp. brevipedunculata include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, often in combination with other medicinal plants, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
